topStories.title: "Give It Up Or Go To Jail": Trump Vows To Find F-15 "Leak", Threatens Media
topStories.description: Trump said US authorities would go directly to the media organisation that published the story and demand the identity of the source.

topStories.title: Hegseth says strikes on Iran increasing as Hormuz deadline looms
topStories.description: US Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth said Monday will be the “largest volume of strikes” on Iran since the war began.

topStories.title: Video: Iran’s top university hit in US-Israeli strikes
topStories.description: Footage shows damaged research buildings at Tehran’s Sharif University following a US-Israeli strike.

topStories.title: Iran threatens ‘Stargate’ AI data centers
topStories.description: Iran said it will target U.S.-linked data centers with new missile strikes, as the war between the U.S. and Iran escalates.

topStories.title: Trump hunts 'sick' mole in US, warns journalist: Reveal source or go to jail
topStories.description: Trump hunts sick mole in US warns journalist Reveal source or go to jail

topStories.title: Free Hormuz Or Oil Catastrophe? Best & Worst-Case Scenarios As Trump's Iran Deadline Nears
topStories.description: The risks of failure remain significant. A collapse in ceasefire efforts could trigger a wider regional conflict.

dailyNews.title: Trump says someone leaked information as US forces looked for downed pilot, warns jail time for leaker
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump on Monday (local time) warned jail time for the leaker who shared critical information as the US forces launched an operation to rescue two F-15E jet pilots after it crashed in Iran on 3 April.

dailyNews.title: Rescuers search for survivors after strikes hit homes in Iran
dailyNews.description: Iranian Red Crescent footage shows damage in Iran, as rescuers search for survivors after US-Israeli strikes hit homes.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Iranians Should Rise Up Against Government If Ceasefire Declared
dailyNews.description: Iran War: Trump, who has threatened to bomb Iran's power plants and bridges, also said he believed Iranians "would be willing to suffer that in order to have freedom."

dailyNews.title: Trump endorses ex-UK political aide Steve Hilton for California governor
dailyNews.description: Steve Hilton, who advised the former prime minster and hosted a Fox News show, is running as a Republican.

dailyNews.title: North Korea keeping Iran at arm’s length, reports Seoul
dailyNews.description: South Korea says Pyongyang is wary as it seeks to renew diplomatic dialogue with the US.

dailyNews.description: The risks of failure remain significant. A collapse in ceasefire efforts could trigger a wider regional conflict.

dailyNews.title: Democrats blast Trump for Iran ‘war crimes’ threat; Republicans supportive
dailyNews.description: Several members of US Congress question president's fitness for office after his expletive-laden Easter Sunday message.

dailyNews.title: Brent Trades Nearly 1.5% Higher As Trump's Iran War Rhetoric Keeps Oil On The Boil
dailyNews.description: US benchmark WTI hovered near $113.34 as markets reacted to the heightened risk of supply disruptions.

dailyNews.title: Bid to remove CEC Gyanesh Kumar fails as Lok Sabha Speaker, Rajya Sabha Chairman reject notices
dailyNews.description: The process to remove a sitting CEC is similar to that of the removal of a judge of the Supreme Court or a high court. Individuals in these positions can only be removed from on the ground of 'proven misbehaviour or incapacity'.

dailyNews.title: Apple plans Supreme Court appeal in Epic Games App Store battle — again
dailyNews.description: Apple plans to ask the Supreme Court to review its App Store fight with Epic Games, as it challenges a ruling limiting its ability to charge fees on external payments.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns deadline ‘final’ as Iran pushes proposal to end war
dailyNews.description: US president says proposal not enough to avert threat to infrastructure should Iran fail to open Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Middle East Conflict: Trump warns Iran, says ‘entire country could be taken out in one night and it could be tomorrow’
dailyNews.description: Amid the ongoing conflict in Iran, US President Donald Trump on Monday (local time) said that the ‘entire country of Iran could be taken out in one night’.

dailyNews.title: ‘Blew up the whole place’: Donald Trump reveals inside details of the daring mission to rescue captured F-15 pilots
dailyNews.description: Trump told reporters at a White House press briefing that 170 aircraft were used in the operation to recover the first crew member and another 155 in the second rescue mission.

dailyNews.title: Trump praised airman’s rescue in Iran during White House Easter event
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump praised the rescue of a downed American airman in Iran during remarks at the White House Easter Egg roll.

dailyNews.title: Trump Hormuz Deadline LIVE Updates: Trump defends strikes, claims they aid Iranians: ‘They want to hear bombs because…’
dailyNews.description: LIVE: Trump stated that military action is ultimately benefiting Iranians, saying they 'want to hear bombs because they want to be free'. He added that Iranians are not taking to the streets in protest because 'they will be shot immediately' by the regime, contrasting that with ongoing strikes.

dailyNews.title: ‘Take the oil because it’s there for the taking’, says Trump as he suggests use of military power to obtain Iran's oil
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump on Monday (local time) said that if it were up to him, he would have preferred using military power to take control of Iran's vast oil reserves, AP reported

dailyNews.title: After ICE detention, 5‑year‑old Liam Conejo Ramos suffers trauma and sees a psychologist, parents say
dailyNews.description: Liam Conejo Ramos, the five-year-old boy who was detained by the US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) in January this year, reportedly fears being detained again. Sharing how their son has changed, his parents, in an interview, said that he is now seeing a psychologist regularly.

dailyNews.title: US Supreme Court paves way for dismissal of Steve Bannon conviction
dailyNews.description: The order allows a lower court to consider dismissing the former Trump strategist's indictment.

dailyNews.title: US Supreme Court paves way for dismissal of Steve Bannon conviction
dailyNews.description: The order allows a lower court to consider dismissing the former Trump strategist's indictment.

dailyNews.title: Trump address highlights: US President says, ‘We have an active, willing participant on the other side’
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump live address: Trump said the US has an “active, willing participant on the other side” in negotiations. On a potential ceasefire, he added: “I can't talk about ceasefire… They would like to be able to make a deal. I can't say any more than that.”

dailyNews.title: 'We're sinking deeper': Iranians brace for infrastructure strikes as Trump deadline nears
dailyNews.description: Ordinary Iranians respond to the US president's threat to destroy Iran's power plants and bridges unless it opens the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump touts airman rescue mission, boasts Iran could be 'taken out in 1 night'
dailyNews.description: Trump calls the rescue of F-15e airmen behind enemy lines in Iran "very historic" and warns the country could be "taken out" by Tuesday night.

dailyNews.title: White House Egg Roll for Easter features Trump family members amid festive celebration
dailyNews.description: President Trump and first lady Melania Trump hosted the White House Easter Egg Roll on the South Lawn of the White House, with patriotic and festive activities.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court Clears the Way for Dismissal of Bannon Conviction
dailyNews.description: Stephen K. Bannon, a former close aide to President Trump, was convicted for failing to comply with a congressional subpoena related to the investigation into the Jan. 6 attack.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s USAID Overhaul Sent Millions More Dollars to Big U.S.-Based Contractors
dailyNews.description: While organizations in the developing world were nearly shut out, the big aid agencies DOGE had called wasteful received huge infusions of cash, a new analysis found.

dailyNews.title: BNY and Robinhood Will Help Run ‘Trump Accounts’ for Children
dailyNews.description: The new tax-sheltered savings and investment accounts will start accepting deposits this summer.

dailyNews.title: Plunging International Student Enrollment Under Trump Squeezes Colleges
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration’s campaign to curtail international students is not just hitting the elite schools targeted by the government.

dailyNews.title: Forget the A.I. Apocalypse. Memes Have Already Nuked Our Culture.
dailyNews.description: From our jokes and slang to the White House’s policy messaging, internet “brain rot” has escaped our phones to take over … well, everything.
